Container.Name: skiptro
Container.Overview: Automatic TV show intro and credits detection using audio fingerprinting. Scans your media library and generates skip markers that Kodi (via service.skiptro) can use to auto-skip intros during playback.
Container.Changes:
[center][b]Skiptro Change Log[/b][/center]
[b]v0.20.1[/b]
[u]Library[/u] - **Mapped and UNC drive roots**: folder picker accepts `Z:\`, `\\NAS\share`, and other filesystem roots. Previously rejected with "Cannot use folder" because Avalonia returns a relative URI for paths with no parent directory; fix is to read the local filesystem path directly. Reported by Gothico74 (skiptro-releases#5).
[b]v0.20.0[/b]
[u]Library[/u] - **`.skiptro.ignore` marker**: drop an empty `.skiptro.ignore` file in a library, show, or season folder to skip it on scan. Survives library delete and re-add. Manual only for now.
[u]Detection[/u] - **Mel correlation fallback**: recovers episodes that SFP misses due to audio mastering differences. Gated to high-confidence clusters to avoid false positives on genuine no-intro episodes.
[b]v0.19.0[/b] > **Upgrade note**: re-export your libraries after upgrading. Auto-import (below) only picks up sidecars written by 0.19.0+; older `.skiptro.json` files lack the metadata block and will be skipped.
[u]Library[/u] - **Sidecar auto-import on scan**: when scanning, existing `.skiptro.json` sidecars next to video files are imported into the database instead of re-detecting. Fingerprinting only runs on episodes without a sidecar. Force Rescan still re-detects everything from scratch. Solves the "moved drives, re-added library, lost all my scans" pain. Requires sidecars written by 0.19.0+. Re-export once after upgrading to migrate older files. - **Verify Library**: new `Verify` button on each library card and `Verify All` in the status bar. Walks the database for entries pointing at files/seasons/shows that no longer exist on disk, prompts before removal, lists what would be deleted. Libraries on unreachable drives are skipped automatically.
[u]Export[/u] - **Sidecar schema update**: exported `.skiptro.json` now includes a `skiptro` block with `confidence` and `version` alongside the existing `intro` block. Kodi addon ignores unknown keys, so existing consumers keep working. Re-export your libraries once after upgrading: the new schema is required for auto-import to pick up existing sidecars on a future re-add or drive shuffle.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent data: scan results, library config, and database.

Config.Name: Media
Config.Description: Path to your TV show library. Must be read-write so skiptro can write .skiptro.json files alongside episodes. Add more paths below if your media is spread across multiple shares.

Config.Name: Media Paths
Config.Description: Container paths to register as media libraries (comma-separated). Must match your volume mount targets above. If you add more path mappings, add the container paths here too.

Config.Name: Scan Schedule
Config.Description: Cron schedule for automatic scans (default: 3 AM daily).
